case.title: ST. PAUL, M. & M.R. CO. v. MINNESOTA EX REL. CITY OF MINNEAPOLIS

opinion.h4: ST. PAUL, M. & M.R. CO. v. MINNESOTA EX REL. CITY OF MINNEAPOLIS, (1909)
opinion.p: ST. PAUL, MINNEAPOLIS, & MANITOBA RAILWAY COMPANY and Great Northern Railway Company, Plaintiffs in Error, v. STATE OF MINNESOTA EX REL. CITY OF MINNEAPOLIS. No. 162.
Messrs. Rome G. Brown, William R. Begg, and Charles S. Albert for plaintiffs in error.
Messrs. Frank Healy and Albert E. Clarke for defendant in error.
Judgment affirmed on authority of Northern P. R. Co. v. Minnesota, 208 U.S. 583, 52 L. Ed. 630, 28 Sup. Ct. Rep. 341.
